4.query:
timeseries pts = avg(cloud.gcp.apigee_googleapis_com.proxyv2.latencies_percentile),
  by:{percentile,proxy_name,env}
| filter percentile == "p90"
| filter matchesValue(env, $Domain) 
| filter matchesValue(proxy_name, $Proxy)
4.title: Total Latency p90

10.title: API Request Count

16.query:
timeseries pts = avg(cloud.gcp.apigee_googleapis_com.proxyv2.latencies_percentile),
  by:{percentile,proxy_name,env}
| filter percentile == "p95"
| filter matchesValue(env, $Domain) 
| filter matchesValue(proxy_name, $Proxy)
16.title: Total Latency p95

17.query:
timeseries error_count = sum(cloud.gcp.apigee_googleapis_com.proxyv2.response_count),
  by:{env, response_code, proxy_name}
| filter toLong(response_code) >= 400 AND toLong(response_code) < 600
| filter matchesValue(env, $Domain)  
| filter matchesValue(proxy_name, $Proxy)  
| fieldsAdd bucket_total = arraySum(error_count)        // collapse each env×code series
| summarize ErrorCount = toLong(sum(bucket_total)), by:{ResponseStatus=response_code,env, ProxyName=proxy_name} 
| filter ErrorCount > 0
17.title: Proxy Error Count

18.query:
timeseries FailureCount = sum(cloud.gcp.apigee_googleapis_com.proxyv2.response_count, filter: {toLong(response_code) >= 400 AND toLong(response_code) < 600 AND  matchesValue(env, $Domain) AND matchesValue(proxy_name, $Proxy) }),by:{env,proxy_name}
| append [
	timeseries  SuccessCount = sum(cloud.gcp.apigee_googleapis_com.proxyv2.response_count, 
	filter: {toLong(response_code) >= 100 AND toLong(response_code) < 400 AND  matchesValue(env, $Domain) AND matchesValue(proxy_name, $Proxy) }), by:{env,proxy_name} ]
    | limit 100
18.title: Proxy Success/Failure trend

19.title: REDIS Key Count

20.query:
timeseries max(bdb_avg_read_latency_max), by: { bdb_name, cluster }
| fieldsAdd value.A = arrayAvg(`max(bdb_avg_read_latency_max)`)
| filter in(bdb_name,$RedisEnvironment)
| fieldsAdd cluster = if(matchesPhrase(cluster,"central1"),"Cental DB", else : "East DB")
20.title: REDIS Read Latency

21.query:
timeseries max(bdb_read_hits_max), by: { bdb_name, cluster }
| fieldsAdd value.A = arrayMax(`max(bdb_read_hits_max)`)
| filter in(bdb_name,$RedisEnvironment)
| fieldsAdd cluster = if(matchesPhrase(cluster,"central1"),"Cental DB", else : "East DB")
21.title: REDIS Read Hits

23.query:
timeseries max(bdb_avg_write_latency_max), by: { bdb_name, cluster }
| fieldsAdd value.A = arrayAvg(`max(bdb_avg_write_latency_max)`)
| filter in(bdb_name,$RedisEnvironment)
| fieldsAdd cluster = if(matchesPhrase(cluster,"central1"),"Cental DB", else : "East DB")
23.title: REDIS Write Latency

24.query:
timeseries max(bdb_read_misses), by: { bdb_name, cluster }
| fieldsAdd value.A = arrayMax(`max(bdb_read_misses)`)
| filter in(bdb_name,$RedisEnvironment)
| fieldsAdd cluster = if(matchesPhrase(cluster,"central1"),"Cental DB", else : "East DB")
24.title: REDIS Read MISS

variables.input:
timeseries request_count=sum(cloud.gcp.apigee_googleapis_com.proxyv2.request_count),by:{env,gcp.project.id}
| filter matchesValue(gcp.project.id, $Environment) 
| fields env
| dedup env

timeseries request_count = sum(cloud.gcp.apigee_googleapis_com.proxyv2.request_count),by:{env,proxy_name}
| filter matchesValue(env, $Domain) 
| fields proxy_name
| dedup proxy_name
